title: Visible+
description: A Minecraft PvP visibility pack designed for cleaner gameplay and better readability. Features blue ancient debris, outlined ores, low fire and soul fire, transparent water, clear glass and tinted glass, highlighted suspicious sand and gravel, outlined obs
body: A clean and PvP-focused Minecraft resource pack designed to improve visibility and make gameplay smoother and less distracting. This pack includes a custom crosshair, highlighted tripwire and tripwire hooks for easier spotting, smaller tools that take up less screen space, a smaller totem for better visibility during fights, and a custom-designed mace texture. It also removes the pumpkin overlay, highlights critical hits, and makes particles bigger and easier to see for clearer combat feedback. The inventory GUI is slightly transparent for a cleaner and more modern style while still keeping the vanilla feel. Perfect for Bedwars, SkyWars, and competitive PvP.
